employee-kubernetes-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property in the Maven POM to target Java 17.
employee-kubernetes-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 17 features or enforce Java 17 compatibility.

employee-kubernetes-service/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for cleaner string interpolation.

employee-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API to replace the removed javax.annotation module in Java 17.
employee-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation module was removed in Java 11 and fully deprecated/removed in Java 17; without this dependency, classes using @PostConstruct, @PreDestroy, or @Resource will fail to compile or throw NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.

Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17 serialization best practices.
Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: Java 16+ enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial (or be private static final long) to avoid compile-time errors when using strict serialization checks or specific compiler flags enabled in newer JDKs.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial, which was added in Java 16. Without this import, the code will fail to compile on Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 17 instead of Java 8.
